# Jaypore Labs - AI-First Development Agency

## About
Jaypore Labs is an AI-first development agency with 8+ years of experience helping SaaS founders and businesses build exceptional software products. We specialize in full-stack development, desktop applications, AI integration, and healthcare technology.

## Founder
Yash Shah - Full-Stack Developer with experience working with global brands like Logitech and Mercedes Benz.

## Services
- Full-Stack Development: End-to-end web applications using React, Next.js, Node.js
- Desktop Applications: Cross-platform Electron applications
- AI Integration: LLM-powered features, AI scribes, voice interfaces
- SaaS Development: MVP to scale, multi-tenant architecture
- Healthcare Technology: HIPAA-compliant medical software
- Technical Consulting: Architecture review, code audits

## Notable Projects
- Nudge AI (getnudgeai.com): AI Scribe for medical practitioners
- Curastream AI (curastreamai.com): Voice-controlled medical assistant
- Lucy (medlucy.com): Healthcare software serving 100+ doctors in Luxembourg
- SmartHabits (smarthabits.logitech.com): Wellness app built for Logitech
- Sonnet AI (sonnetai.com): AI meeting assistant

Website: https://jayporelabs.com

## Technologies
React, Next.js, TypeScript, Node.js, Electron, Python, PostgreSQL, MongoDB, AWS, Docker, OpenAI, TailwindCSS
